name: What if the ladder was defective and I fell at work?
description: Comp for basics, sue maker for extras if defective.

mainEntity.name: What if the ladder was defective and I fell at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics, sue maker for extras if defective.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp covers treatment first; sue ladder manufacturer separately if defect proven.**

Comp is no-fault; third-party product liability possible beyond comp limits.[8]

- Inspect for manufacturing flaws, poor maintenance.
- OSHA requires proper ladders.[7]
- Expert analysis needed.

File comp claim immediately, then explore lawsuit. Consult attorney for dual claims.
